ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the trial started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the trial ended */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial is conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trial was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trial */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of calibration in days */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sensor entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sensor entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor position */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor in this position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor position */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the sensor position */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the sensor position */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z coordinate of the sensor position */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sensor position entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor position entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sensor position entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor position entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_positions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_positions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_positions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor this data was collected from */,
  "sample_number" INTEGER /* Sample number of this data point */,
  "sensor_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "matching_condition" TEXT /* Matching condition for this data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sensor data was collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_sensor_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_sensor_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_sensor_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., general, critical, informational) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was calibrated */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value of the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration process */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the calibration entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the calibration entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the calibration entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the calibration entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matching_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matching condition */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the matching condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the matching condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the matching condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matching_conditions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matching_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matching_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_numbers" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample number */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this sample number belongs to */,
  "sample_number" INTEGER /* Sample number */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sample number entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample number entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sample number entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample number entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_numbers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_numbers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_numbers_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor value */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this value belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor this value was collected from */,
  "sensor_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sensor value was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the value was recorded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the value */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_values_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_values_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_values_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_values_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date this version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
